content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Mixed market with Nifty flat (+0.15%), banks weak (PSU Bank -1.24%, Bank Nifty -0.55%), but power/metals/energy strong. VIX cooling (-4.7%) is constructive. Book is 60% deployed with several positions sitting just above SL — priority is risk management on existing book, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 3.8% but SL at 76.50 still intact (CMP 78.38). Strong Q4 results (+35% PAT, NNPA 0.13%, CASA 52.5%) and PSU bank index near 52w highs support thesis. Equity raise overhang is the headwind. SL is 2.4% below CMP — appropriate. Hold; will exit on SL trigger."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 6.6%, current SL already at 1032.38 (above entry 984) — locking ~5% gain. No-op MODIFY avoided: keeping current SL/target as is means HOLD. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1.3%, SL at 119 (~3.6% below CMP 123.45). Gold thesis intact as macro hedge. FOMC this week is binary catalyst — hold position; SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 1.6% at fresh 52w high (1437). Blockbuster Q4 (revenue +22.6%, PAT +27%) confirms thesis. Trailing SL up from 1413 to 1418 (just above entry 1412.94) to lock breakeven+. Per trailing mandate (≥2% gain → SL ≥ entry). Stock at 52w high, want to give it room but lock profits."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 2.5%, SL 2295 (~0.7% below CMP 2312). Q4 results Apr 30 — binary event in 2 days. SL is tight enough; let the print decide. Not adding, not trimming pre-event. If SL hits, exit cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 1.5%, SL already at 406 (above entry 404.50) — breakeven+ locked. Near 52w high with EDF nuclear catalyst, Q4 May 15. SL is currently 1.1% below CMP which is appropriate for the level. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 2.3%, SL 1775 just below CMP 1767.60 — actually CMP has dipped below SL trigger zone. Stock made fresh 52w high intraday (1816) but reversed. SL is ~0.4% above CMP — likely to trigger soon. Let SL execute mechanically; do not loosen. Hold the SL discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1734.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 1.1%, with Organon acquisition catalyst now confirmed (5.3x volume). Trailing SL up from 1720 to 1734 (entry breakeven). Heavy debt financing concern but near-term momentum strong. Locking entry-level protection."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 0.6%, SL already at 318 (~0.5% below CMP 319.95) — very tight. Defensive transmission play; thesis intact. SL is at minimum acceptable — let it work. Q4 results May 19."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 76.50 intact; Q4 results strong. Mechanical SL handles downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1032.38 (well above entry 984), locks ~5% gain. No further trail needed yet — give it room to reach 1095 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 119 adequate; FOMC binary event upcoming."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to just above breakeven after fresh 52w high; lock gains while leaving room for momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings Apr 30 — let SL at 2295 manage downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 406 already locks breakeven+. Q4 May 15 catalyst ahead."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1775 very close to CMP 1767.60 — likely SL trigger; let mechanical exit work. Do not loosen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1734.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to entry breakeven after Organon catalyst confirmed and momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 318 already tight; defensive utility — let position breathe to Q4."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "VBL (Q1 +18% rev, volume surge 4x, Emkay TP 620), NLCINDIA (fresh ATH, momentum + coal block wins), MANAPPURAM (Bain takeover), and CPSEETF (PSU theme breakout) all look interesting but book is already 60% deployed with NTPC+TORNTPOWER+POWERGRID giving heavy power-cluster exposure. No fresh entries today — power cluster cap reached. Will reconsider VBL/MANAPPURAM if cash frees up via SL hits or target completions. INDIACEM 17.7x volume needs investigation but Motilal Sell flag and FY26 still loss-making — pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed across 9 positions, with power/energy cluster (NTPC+POWERGRID+TORNTPOWER) at ~16% of capital — at the watch-zone. Three pending OPEN orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) — TATAPOWER would push power cluster over 20% if it fills, recommend monitoring. No new entries this tick: priority is letting trailing SLs do their work on winners (NESTLEIND, SUNPHARMA, NTPC, PNBHOUSING) and respecting mechanical SLs on losers (MAHABANK, TORNTPOWER, HINDUNILVR). Cumulative P&L only +0.30% in 9 days — slow start but capital preserved, which is the goal in early phase. Will not chase breakouts when book is already this loaded."
}
